name: CPAP Europa
whyWeLikeThem: Carries the mainstream CPAP, APAP and BiPAP brands most clinics in Europe prescribe.
Multi-language site makes it easier to order if English isn't your first language.
Useful for people in EU markets where local clinic supply is limited.
verifyBeforeLaunch: Confirm shipping countries, returns window, warranty terms and affiliate parameter before publishing.

name: CPAP Store EU
whyWeLikeThem: EU-domain specialist focused on CPAP equipment.
Stocks masks, machines, hoses, filters and accessories from major manufacturers.
Sensible option for people who'd rather buy from within the EU than ship from the US.
verifyBeforeLaunch: Confirm shipping coverage, returns window, warranty, and affiliate parameter before publishing.
